title: gladiolus testaceus
intro: Gladiolus testaceus, also known as the African corn lily or red corn lily, is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, and is used to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin infections, and fever. The health benefits of Gladiolus testaceus include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and fighting off infections, making it a valuable plant in traditional medicine. The plant is often prepared as a tincture, decoction, or infusion in herbal preparations, which can be used to treat various ailments.
